text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Doto! Are you really sure it's okay if I<n>order an
extra-large shrimp fried<n>rice?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-of course. Since I have this coupon,<n>you can
order anything you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say, Doto, you've got great<n>fortune to
have found your New<n>Year's gift from last year!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Can you really call it good fortune to<n>forget
something you received?<n>...Either way, you sure
you want to<n>use your gift on us?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! What a glorious banquet<n>you have
prepared for us, Doto!<n>Might I propose a toast?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I... It's nothing... really. I'm going to<n>the restroom,
so you can order before<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Phew, I'm so glad. It looks like<n>everyone's
having a good time.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(It's a good thing I found this food<n>coupon... Wait,
huh? ...Huhhh?!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(N-no way! The expiration date... It<n>expired last
month?!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Wha, wh-wh-wh-what do I do?! I<n>don't have
much cash on me either!)

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yummy! The shrimp's so juicy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And look at the vibrant pink swirl in<n>the fish cake!
It's a sure sign of good<n>luck!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(E-everyone was really looking<n>forward to this
day! How can I break<n>the neeews?!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(If it's come to this... Hnnngh! Then I<n>have no
other choice!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was delicious! I'm feeling<n>lucky
'cause my tummy's full of<n>yummy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems that the host of<n>the day has
been absent for a while<n>now... Where could she
have gone?

H-hello. Would you be interested in<n>some sweet
dim sum dishes for<n>dessert?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes! Five sesame balls and five<n>almond tofu
please!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
G-gotcha! Sesame balls and almond<n>tofu for table
three!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wait, what are you doing, Doto?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Long story short... I realized that not<n>only had the
food coupon expired, but<n>I'm also not carrying
much cash on<n>me. So I started to rack my brain.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And it suddenly came to me... In times<n>like these,
people usually help around<n>the restaurant
washing dishes and<n>stuff to pay their debt.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto... We could've just split the bill,<n>you know?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a minute. It appears that the<n>magic in this
food coupon hasn't run<n>out yet.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm! The expiry date is next year,<n>not last
month! Which means you<n>have plenty of time left
to redeem it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-so I was going around in circles<n>because of a
misunderstanding?!<n>Th-this is so embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Geez... You really outdid yourself this<n>time. We
were discussing how we<n>were going to repay
the favor to you,<n>too.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? R-repay me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! While you were gone, we were<n>talking in
secret! We're thinking of<n>treating you to dinner
next time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Needless to say, it will be<n>accompanied by a
dinner show from<n>yours truly! Ha ha ha! A
wonderful<n>idea, don't you think?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll pick an auspicious day and find a<n>restaurant
with great feng shui!<n>Doesn't that sound nice?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I can't wait!
